prompts.text: This game builds 'one-to-one correspondence' — each tap matches exactly one number. Model: 'One... [tap]. Two... [tap].' The deliberate pause reinforces the connection between number and object.
Name each numeral clearly as you count together: 'That dot is number 4 — it comes after 3 and before 5.' Builds numeral recognition alongside the count sequence.
Before starting: 'How many dots do you think there are? Let's count them first.' — prediction and pre-counting sets up purposeful engagement.
When the picture reveals: 'What animal is it? What can you tell me about it?' — extends the activity from counting into vocabulary and world knowledge.
